description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-select

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-select/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 86 (B)
**Known issues:** 20 properties missing descriptions including formAssociated, _internals, _options, _selectedValues, _activeIndex, _searchQuery, _filteredOptions, _displayValue, and more.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Trigger, listbox, option highlight, scrollbar. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Listbox pattern. aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant. Keyboard (arrow keys, Enter, Escape, typeahead).
3. **Functionality** — Single/multi select. Search/filter. Placeholder. Clear. Form integration. Required. Validation. Option groups.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. formAssociated. ElementInternals. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Listbox positioning. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix all 20 missing descriptions. Lowest scoring component.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Selection. Multi-select. Search. Keyboard. Form. Validation.
8. **Storybook** — Single. Multi. Searchable. Groups. Required. Error.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Select list replacement. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-select
